title: lathyrus niger subsp. jordani
intro: Lathyrus niger subsp. jordani, also known as Jordano's vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Jordano's vetch include potential relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its benefits, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
